titleEn: Fourth of July promotions boost produce advertising
titleZh: 美国独立日促销推动果蔬广告激增
summaryZh: 美国农业部最新零售报告显示，独立日促销活动推动果蔬广告数量同比增长17%，达到310,083条。水果广告占比57%，蔬菜33%，有机产品占12%。价格方面，无籽西瓜、菠萝和蓝莓价格上涨显著，而覆盆子、黑莓和西梅价格下降。报告还提及加州葡萄、佐治亚州蓝莓等产区动态。
featuredReason: 该报告展示了美国果蔬市场在独立日促销下的广告与价格动态，虽不直接涉及智慧畜牧技术，但为畜牧行业人士提供了农产品市场趋势的参考，有助于理解上下游供应链变化。
contentFull: U.S. National Retail Report - 26 June: Fourth of July promotions boost produce advertising Fourth of July sales were popping like firecrackers this week as shoppers got an early start to holiday preparations. Produce aisles were sparkling with the season's freshest cherries, nectarines, peaches, berries, melons, grapes, limes, and plums. Explosively delicious vegetables like corn, asparagus, sweet onions, zucchini, cucumbers, and colored bell peppers were at the ready for crisp salads or grilled meals. Patriotic floral arrangements lit up the atmosphere in stores. © USDA Total ad numbers this week were 310,083, a 1% decrease from last week's total of 314,351. The total for the same week last year was 17% lower at 265,811. The total number of ads broken out by commodity groups was fruit 176,571 (57%), onions and potatoes 27,869 (9%), vegetables 102,859 (33%), herbs 1,568, ornamentals 585, hemp 111, and honey 2,088. The number of ads for organic produce was 36,058, representing 12% of total ads. © USDA The following are the prices of major advertised items (3,000-plus ads) this week, compared to the same week last year. Significant increases in price for fruit this week included seedless watermelons (each) at 22%, pineapples (each) at 15%, and blueberries (1-pint packs) at 13%. Significant decreases included raspberries (6-ounce packs) at 28%, blackberries (5.6 to 6-ounce packs) at 17%, plums (per pound) at 13%, and white seedless grapes (per pound) at 12%. © USDA The sole significant change in price for potatoes and onions was a 10% increase for yellow sweet onions (per pound). Significant increases in price for vegetables this week included only sweet corn (each) at 19%. There were no significant decreases. © USDA To view the full report, click here. For more information:USDATel: +1 202 720 2791Email: [email protected]www.mymarketnews.ams.usda.gov Georgia's perennial crop area expands as citrus plantations decline Heat stresses apple trees and growers in Midelt Georgia expands blueberry area in Adjara and targets export growth Industry looks to branding, quality and retail to revive pear consumption Australian Soluna apples return to the U.S. with expanded supply Fourth of July push for California table grapes following early start Smooth transition expected to 2026-2027 Pacific Northwest apple crop “We are expanding our apple range with the Strauss EW20 multi-head weigher” “Sicilian grapes are increasingly recognised for their premium varieties” "Sales of Dumara watermelons are booming, but apart from that, it's a complete washout" Georgia's perennial crop area expands as citrus plantations decline Heat stresses apple trees and growers in Midelt Georgia expands blueberry area in Adjara and targets export growth Industry looks to branding, quality and retail to revive pear consumption Australian Soluna apples return to the U.S. with expanded supply Fourth of July push for California table grapes following early start Smooth transition expected to 2026-2027 Pacific Northwest apple crop “We are expanding our apple range with the Strauss EW20 multi-head weigher” “Sicilian grapes are increasingly recognised for their premium varieties” "Sales of Dumara watermelons are booming, but apart from that, it's a complete washout" Fresh India Show 2026 Morocco Tomato Conference 2026 CPMA 2026 Retail Tour Toronto CPMA 2026
translationZh: 美国全国零售报告 - 6月26日：独立日促销活动推动果蔬广告激增。本周独立日销售像烟花一样火爆，消费者提前开始节日准备。果蔬区闪耀着当季最新鲜的樱桃、油桃、桃子、浆果、甜瓜、葡萄、青柠和李子。玉米、芦笋、甜洋葱、西葫芦、黄瓜和彩色甜椒等爆炸性美味的蔬菜已准备好用于清爽沙拉或烧烤餐。爱国主题花卉布置点亮了店内氛围。© USDA 本周广告总数为310,083条，较上周的314,351条下降1%。去年同期广告总数为265,811条，同比下降17%。按商品类别划分的广告总数为：水果176,571条（57%），洋葱和土豆27,869条（9%），蔬菜102,859条（33%），香草1,568条，观赏植物585条，大麻111条，蜂蜜2,088条。有机农产品广告数为36,058条，占总广告数的12%。© USDA 以下是本周主要广告商品（超过3,000条广告）的价格，与去年同期相比。本周水果价格显著上涨的包括：无籽西瓜（每个）上涨22%，菠萝（每个）上涨15%，蓝莓（1品脱包装）上涨13%。价格显著下降的包括：覆盆子（6盎司包装）下降28%，黑莓（5.6至6盎司包装）下降17%，西梅（每磅）下降13%，无籽白葡萄（每磅）下降12%。© USDA 土豆和洋葱方面唯一显著的价格变化是黄甜洋葱（每磅）上涨10%。本周蔬菜价格显著上涨的仅有甜玉米（每个）上涨19%。没有显著下降。© USDA 如需查看完整报告，请点击此处。更多信息：美国农业部，电话：+1 202 720 2791，邮箱：[email protected]，网站：www.mymarketnews.ams.usda.gov。佐治亚州多年生作物面积扩大，柑橘种植面积下降。高温给米德勒特的苹果树和种植者带来压力。佐治亚州在阿贾拉扩大蓝莓种植面积，目标出口增长。行业寻求通过品牌、质量和零售重振梨消费。澳大利亚Soluna苹果以更大供应量重返美国市场。加州鲜食葡萄在提前开始后迎来独立日推动。预计2026-2027年太平洋西北苹果作物将平稳过渡。“我们正在通过Strauss EW20多头称重机扩大苹果系列。”“西西里葡萄因其优质品种而日益受到认可。”“Dumara西瓜销量激增，但除此之外，完全是一场灾难。”佐治亚州多年生作物面积扩大，柑橘种植面积下降。高温给米德勒特的苹果树和种植者带来压力。佐治亚州在阿贾拉扩大蓝莓种植面积，目标出口增长。行业寻求通过品牌、质量和零售重振梨消费。澳大利亚Soluna苹果以更大供应量重返美国市场。加州鲜食葡萄在提前开始后迎来独立日推动。预计2026-2027年太平洋西北苹果作物将平稳过渡。

Produce aisles were sparkling with the season's freshest cherries, nectarines, peaches, berries, melons, grapes, limes, and plums. Explosively delicious vegetables like corn, asparagus,…
